","activeState":null,"dynamicValues":[],"blockClientScript":"","blockDataScript":"","props":{},"customAttributes":{}}],"baseStyles":{"display":"inline-flex","flexDirection":"column","flexShrink":0,"overflow":"hidden","alignItems":"center","justifyContent":"center","width":"40px","height":"40px","borderRadius":"9999px","cursor":"pointer","color":"#71717a","hover:backgroundColor":"#f4f4f5","hover:color":"#18181b"},"rawStyles":{"transition":"background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out"},"mobileStyles":{},"tabletStyles":{},"attributes":{},"classes":[],"dataKey":null,"blockName":"theme-switcher","element":"div","activeState":null,"dynamicValues":[],"blockClientScript":"const toggle = this;
if (this.dataset.blockId) return;
const root = document.documentElement;
const KEY = "page-theme";
let isDark = (localStorage.getItem(KEY) ?? "light") === "dark";
const sun = toggle.querySelector(".theme-sun");
const moon = toggle.querySelector(".theme-moon");
function apply(dark) {
  root.dataset.theme = dark ? "dark" : "light";
  localStorage.setItem(KEY, dark ? "dark" : "light");
  if (sun) sun.style.display = dark ? "inline-flex" : "none";
  if (moon) moon.style.display = dark ? "none" : "inline-flex";
}
apply(isDark);
toggle.addEventListener("click", () => { isDark = !isDark; apply(isDark); });","blockDataScript":"","props":{},"editorConfig":{"showChildrenInEditor":false,"icon":"lucide-moon"},"customAttributes":{}}
name: Theme Switcher
